items.br: Extrai as notas de desempenho dos colaboradores no ciclo de compensação (Compensation Workbench). Vincula ratings a assignments para suportar decisões de mérito e bônus.
items.en: Extracts worker performance ratings in the Compensation Workbench cycle. Links ratings to assignments to support merit and bonus decisions.
items.es: Extrae las notas de desempeño de los colaboradores en el ciclo de Compensation Workbench. Vincula ratings a assignments para soportar decisiones de mérito y bono.
